add_recipient.title: Add recipient
add_recipient.description: Add a new saved SMS recipient.

edit_recipient_select.title: Select recipient to edit
edit_recipient_select.description: Choose the saved recipient you want to edit.

edit_recipient.title: Edit recipient
edit_recipient.description: Update the selected recipient name or phone number.

delete_recipients.title: Delete recipients
delete_recipients.description: Choose one or more recipients to remove.

forwarding.title: SMS and call forwarding
forwarding.description:
Forward received messages and incoming-call notifications to selected saved recipients. The integration always removes the source number from the target list, so it never sends a copy back to the sender. Messages recognized as commands are not forwarded by default.

Template variables: `{data_czas}`, `{nadawca}`, `{nazwa_nadawcy}`, `{wiadomosc}`, `{dzwoniacy}`, `{typ}`.

data.forward_calls_enabled: Send an SMS notification for incoming calls
data.forward_command_messages: Also forward SMS messages recognized as commands
data.forward_excluded_recipient_ids: Do not forward messages or calls from these saved senders

sms_commands.title: SMS commands and replies

add_sms_rule.title: Add SMS rule
add_sms_rule.description:
Messages may contain multiple words. Polish characters, letter case, and repeated whitespace are ignored. Search for an entity by name or entity_id.

A reply template can combine any description with variables: `{zmienna}`, `{stan}`, `{jednostka}`, `{nazwa_encji}`, `{entity_id}`, `{nadawca}`, `{komenda}`. Example: `The living room temperature is {zmienna} degrees`.

data.name: Rule name
data.reply_enabled: Send a reply after success (state reports always reply)

edit_sms_rule.title: Edit SMS rule
edit_sms_rule.description:
Change the sender, multi-word command, entity, operation, or reply templates.

A template can contain custom text and variables: `{zmienna}`, `{stan}`, `{jednostka}`, `{nazwa_encji}`, `{entity_id}`, `{nadawca}`, `{komenda}`. Example: `The living room temperature is {zmienna} degrees`.

data.name: Rule name
data.reply_enabled: Send a reply after success (state reports always reply)

delete_sms_rules.title: Delete SMS rules
delete_sms_rules.description: Select one or more rules to delete.

entity_mapping.title: Entity mapping
entity_mapping.description: Optionally override the object_id values used to auto-detect ESPHome entities.

config_entry_id.name: Config entry ID
config_entry_id.description: Leave empty if only one gateway is configured.

saved_recipients.name: Saved recipients
saved_recipients.description: Select one or more saved recipients configured in Q-Tronic SMS Gateway.

recipient.description: Optional phone number in international format. Use this only for numbers not saved in the integration.

ring_time_s.description: How long the modem should keep dialing before it disconnects the call.

restart_required.title: Restart Home Assistant to finish updating Q-Tronic SMS Gateway
restart_required.description:
The Q-Tronic SMS Gateway add-on synchronized a new custom integration version (`{synced_version}`) into `/config/custom_components`, but Home Assistant is still running version `{current_version}`. Restart Home Assistant Core to load the updated integration and restore actions like `qtronic_sms_gateway.send_sms` / `qtronic_sms_gateway.call_to`.

Previous synced version: `{previous_version}`.
